ham.subject: Out of Office: Returning Thursday
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from Friday, March 29th to Wednesday, April 4th. I will be back on Thursday, April 5th.

For any urgent matters, please contact Sarah Lee at sarah.lee@example.com or call 555-123-4567.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
John Doe

spam.subject: Urgent: Claim Your $10,000 Scholarship Now!
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! Your application has been selected for a $10,000 tuition scholarship from the prestigious Global Scholars University.

To secure your scholarship, please verify your enrollment details by clicking the link below:
<URL>

Please note that if you do not act within 48 hours, your scholarship offer will be revoked. We require a confirmation of your personal information and a copy of your student ID to process the award.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Admissions Office
Global Scholars University
